creator: ncrogers@gmail.com
text: I am guessing this bug is not present in 11.3 since the large dnode feature doesn't appear to be in it, at least not that I can see in the SVN changelog? I have no official affiliation with FreeBSD, but based on my experience there is unlikely to be a 12.0 errata for this fix since it doesn't affect everyone. I would assume the problem still exists in CURRENT (13.0) so someone needs to decide what the correct approach is to fix this in CURRENT, and that can hopefully get MFCd to 12-STABLE and it will be fixed in 12.1. At least that is what I am hoping for...
